name: Suspicious Use of CSharp Interactive Console
description: Detects the execution of the C# interactive console (`csi.exe`) from PowerShell. Adversaries may use this combination to execute malicious C# code. While legitimate uses exist, this pattern can indicate suspicious activity.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'csi.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the csi.exe executable.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process, which should be 'powershell.exe'.

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent powershell.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute csi.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which csi.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
